2606.14694.title: AdaSR: Adaptive Streaming Reasoning with Hierarchical Relative Policy Optimization
2606.14694.paper_summary: Large reasoning models typically follow a read-then-think paradigm: they observe the complete input, reason over a static context, and then produce the answer. Yet many real-world scenarios are inherently dynamic, such as audio and video stream, where information arrives as a continuous stream and models must reason, update, and respond under partial observations. Recent streaming reasoning methods allow models to think while reading, but they largely rely on supervised imitation of pre-constructed trajectories, which limits their flexibility. In this paper, we propose AdaSR, an adaptive streaming reasoning framework that enables models to reason during input streaming and perform final deliberation once the stream is complete, learning when to think, and how much computation to allocate across different stages. To optimize this hierarchical reasoning process, we introduce Hierarchical Relative Policy Optimization (HRPO), which decomposes policy optimization into streaming reasoning and deep reasoning phases, providing more fine-grained advantage assignment instead of uniformly distributing a single sequence-level advantage over all tokens. HRPO integrates format, accuracy, and adaptive thinking rewards to enforce valid reasoning protocols, preserve final task performance, and encourage latency-aware computation allocation. Experiments show that AdaSR achieves a better balance among reasoning accuracy, computational efficiency, and streaming latency compared with supervised fine-tuning baseline. We release our code at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/StreamingLLM/tree/main/AdaSR.
2606.14694.paper_summary_zh: 大型推理模型通常遵循讀取然後思考的範式：它們觀察完整的輸入，對靜態上下文進行推理，然後產生答案。<lb/>然而，許多現實世界的場景本質上是動態的，例如音頻和視頻流，其中信息作為連續流到達，模型必須在部分觀察下進行推理、更新和響應。<lb/>最近的流式推理方法允許模型在閱讀時進行思考，但它們在很大程度上依賴於對預構建軌跡的監督模仿，這限制了它們的靈活性。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了AdaSR，一個自適應流式推理框架，該框架使模型能夠在輸入流中進行推理，並在流結束後進行最終的深思熟慮，學習何時思考以及在不同階段分配多少計算。<lb/>為了優化這一分層推理過程，我們引入了分層相對策略優化（HRPO），它將策略優化分解為流式推理和深度推理階段，提供更細緻的優勢分配，而不是在所有標記上均勻分配單一序列級別的優勢。<lb/>HRPO整合了格式、準確性和自適應思考獎勵，以強化有效的推理協議，保持最終任務性能，並鼓勵延遲感知的計算分配。<lb/>實驗表明，與監督微調基線相比，AdaSR在推理準確性、計算效率和流式延遲之間達到了更好的平衡。<lb/>我們的代碼已在 https://github.com/EIT-NLP/StreamingLLM/tree/main/AdaSR 上發布。
2606.14694.author: Junlong Tong et.al.
2606.14694.authors: Junlong Tong, Wenqi Xu, Yingqi Fan, Anhao Zhao, Xuan Lu, Yang Tan, Xiaoyu Shen
